memoryArtifacts.headline: The Death of Earl Siward (1861) by James Smetham, a 19th-century representation of Earl Siward readying for death.
Anachronistic early 19th-century depiction by John Martin of Mac Bethad (center-right) watching Siward's Northumbrian army approaching.
The dying Earl Siward clad in armour embraces a young man and woman. Etching by James Smetham, 1861.
Name of Siward, Earl of Northumbria as it appears on folio 161v of British Library Cotton MS Tiberius B I (the "Anglo-Saxon Chronicle").

zh.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.是Bjorn Boreson的兒子，於從0997年1月6日到0998年1月5日出生在丹麥。他於大約1045年與Ælfflæd III of Northumbria結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1055年3月26日在英國越可爾約克，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.是Bjorn Boreson的儿子，于从0997年1月6日到0998年1月5日出生在丹麦。他于大约1045年与Ælfflæd III of Northumbria结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1055年3月26日在英国越可爾約克，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Siward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Seward
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.
King Canute is declared ruler of Denmark, England and Norway.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. was born from 6 January 0997 to 5 January 0998, in Denmark as the son of Bjorn Boreson. He married Ælfflæd III of Northumbria about 1045. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 26 March 1055, in York, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. est né du 6 janvier 0997 au 5 janvier 0998, à Danemark, fils de Bjorn Boreson. Il a épousé Ælfflæd III of Northumbria environ 1045. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1055, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. wurde von 6. Januar 0997 bis 5. Januar 0998 in Dänemark, als Sohn von Bjorn Boreson geboren. Er hat um 1045 Ælfflæd III of Northumbria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 26. März 1055 in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. è nato il da 6 gennaio 0997 a 5 gennaio 0998 nel Danimarca come figlio di Bjorn Boreson. Lui sposato Ælfflæd III of Northumbria circa 1045. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 marzo 1055, nel York, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.はから0997年1月6日まで0998年1月5日にデンマークでBjorn Boresonの息子として生まれた。約1045年にÆlfflæd III of Northumbriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1055年3月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.(은)는 0997년 1월 6일부터 0998년 1월 5일까지 덴마크에서 Bjorn Boreson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1045년 Ælfflæd III of Northumbria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1055년 3월 26일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. nasceu de 6 de janeiro de 0997 a 5 de janeiro de 0998, em Dinamarca filho de Bjorn Boreson. Ele casou-se com Ælfflæd III of Northumbria aproximadamente 1045. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1055, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.997–26 March 1055: din 6 ianuarie 0997 până în 5 ianuarie 0998–26 martie 1055

ru.997–26 March 1055: с 6 января 0997 по 5 января 0998–26 марта 1055 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. родился с 6 января 0997 по 5 января 0998 в местности Дания. Его отца звали Bjorn Boreson. Он женился на женщине по имени Ælfflæd III of Northumbria около 1045 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 26 марта 1055 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. nació desde 6 de enero de 0997 hasta 5 de enero de 0998, en Dinamarca como hijo de Bjorn Boreson. Se casó con Ælfflæd III of Northumbria aproximadamente 1045. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1055, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
